simd/archsimd: use V(P)MOVMSK for mask ToBits if possible  VPMOVMSKB, VMOVMSKPS, and VMOVMSKPD moves AVX1/2-style masks to integer registers, similar to VPMOV[BWDQ]2M (which moves to mask registers).
